series_metadata.series_description: Including, but not limited to, submitted vendor documents and records of meetings of the Board of Voting Machine Examiners.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for four (4) years, then may destroy. Meeting transcripts to be transferred to State Archives for permanent retention. ; Electronic: Retain for four (4) years, then may destroy. Meeting transcripts to be transferred to State Archives for permanent retention., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
